non_blocking_notes: Supervisor commands hardcode /app/corescope paths, which matches the current one-container contract but means CORESCOPE_CONFIG_DIR/CORESCOPE_DB_PATH overrides are not intended to move runtime paths.
Local config renders default to ./config.json outside Docker; /config.json is ignored to avoid accidental secret staging.
verification: python3 extraction of docker/start.sh embedded SQL | sqlite3 ':memory:'
Docker smoke from prior Step 3 run verified public config endpoints reflected env overrides without exposing dummy API key, MQTT broker, or MQTT password.
Docker smoke from prior Step 3 run verified CORESCOPE_ENABLE_INGESTOR=true with no MQTT source leaves the ingestor disabled.
review_summary: Step 3 implements environment-driven CoreScope config generation, Docker/Compose env wiring, private generated config output, and no-secret local startup behavior without correctness blockers.
